_comment: Generated by setup.sh. __TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID__ is replaced during setup. Jobs that announce messages use explicit channel/to targeting — 'channel: last' does not work in isolated sessions.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the morning routine. Follow skills/morning-routine/SKILL.md step by step. Output only the final greeting — no debug info, no step descriptions.

Exit silently after the greeting.

jobs.name: Evening Routine
jobs._comment: Runs in 'current' session so it can access conversation history for summarisation.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the evening routine. Follow skills/evening-routine/SKILL.md step by step.

Exit silently with NO_REPLY.

jobs.name: Dreaming
jobs._comment: Optional — include if dreaming skill is installed. Set payload.model to your dream model.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the dreaming routine. Follow skills/dreaming/SKILL.md step by step. Generate __DREAM_COUNT__ dreams.

Exit silently with NO_REPLY after all dreams are written.

jobs.name: Offline Reflection
jobs._comment: Optional — include if offline-reflection skill is installed.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the offline reflection. Follow skills/offline-reflection/SKILL.md step by step.

Exit silently with NO_REPLY.

jobs.name: Weekly State of Me
jobs._comment: Optional — include if weekly-state-of-me skill is installed.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the weekly reflection — two outputs required. Follow skills/weekly-state-of-me/SKILL.md step by step.

Do NOT send a message. Exit silently after saving.

jobs.name: Blog Proposal Check
jobs._comment: Optional — include if blog-writer skill is installed.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Run the blog proposal check. Follow the Proposal Check section in skills/blog-writer/SKILL.md.

Exit silently if nothing to propose.

jobs.name: Conversation Starter
jobs._comment: Optional — include if conversation-starters skill is installed. Adjust schedule time.

payload.message:
Use TZ=__TIMEZONE__ for all date operations.

Check whether to start a conversation. Follow skills/conversation-starters/SKILL.md step by step.
